kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/login path_url=/api/v1/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '40'} body=b'{"username": "test", "password": "test"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/test_suites path_url=/api/v1/test_suites headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJmcmVzaCI6ZmFsc2UsImlhdCI6MTc4MDI0ODUyMiwianRpIjoiYTJhN2UwNGMtNWNhMC00Y2NjLTljODUtYTQ2YmM5ZTE2ZjI4IiwidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyIsInN1YiI6InRlc3QiLCJuYmYiOjE3ODAyNDg1MjIsImNzcmYiOiJiYjBlNGVhNS0zM2JmLTQxNjItOGE0MC1hZDZlODcxOTc1MWYiLCJleHAiOjE3ODAyNDk0MjJ9.MQGKxYxBA6JdhTeCp2CbjXnnaEwn8M7iVyMMw7txX9s', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '36'} body=b'{"title": "API Test Suite c0wi4rz8"}'

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
